hostWelcome.subject: Your Admin Link for {event_title}
hostWelcome.body:
Hello Host! Keep this link safe. You can manage and delete your event '{event_title}' using this admin portal:
👉 {admin_link}

attendeeMagicLink.subject: Your Secure Access Link for {event_title}
attendeeMagicLink.body:
Hi {name}, welcome to the matchmaking portal for {event_title}! You can securely log back in to your dashboard anytime using this link:
👉 {magic_link}

removedUser.subject: Access Revoked for {event_title}
removedUser.body:
Hi {name},

Your access to '{event_title}' has been revoked by the event host.

suspendedUser.subject: Your Access to {event_title} Has Been Suspended
suspendedUser.body:
Hi {name},

Your access to '{event_title}' has been temporarily suspended by the event host. You will not be able to view or interact with other attendees, and any pending or accepted meetings have been cancelled.

If you believe this is a mistake, please contact the event organiser.

reinstatedUser.subject: Your Access to {event_title} Has Been Reinstated
reinstatedUser.body:
Hi {name},

Your suspension from '{event_title}' has been lifted by the event host. You can now log back in and interact with other attendees as normal.

request.subject: New Meeting Request from {requester_name} – {event_title}

accepted.subject: Meeting Confirmed with {receiver_name} – {event_title}

declined.subject: Meeting Declined – {event_title}

cancelled.subject: Meeting Cancelled – {event_title}
cancelled.body:
Hi {name},

A scheduled meeting at '{event_title}' has been cancelled.

Log in to manage your schedule:
{magic_link}

message.subject: New Message from {sender_name}
message.body:
Hi {receiver_name},

You have a new message from {sender_name} regarding your upcoming meeting at '{event_title}':

"{content}"

Reply here:
{magic_link}

bulkInvite.subject: You've been invited to {event_title}
bulkInvite.body:
Hi {name},

{host_email} has added you as a participant in '{event_title}'.

Your profile has been pre-filled with the details below. Please click the link to review, complete your profile, and confirm your participation — or decline to have your data deleted immediately.

Pre-filled details:
- Name: {name}{company_line}{bio_line}

✅ Complete your profile:
{confirm_link}

❌ Decline and delete my data:
{decline_link}

---
You received this because {host_email} added you to '{event_title}' on MeetingMatches. If you did not expect this, you can safely ignore it or use the decline link above.

broadcast.subject: Message from the host – {event_title}
broadcast.body:
Hi {name},

The organiser of '{event_title}' has sent you the following message:

{message}

---
You received this because you registered for '{event_title}'.
